title: Ninjacart Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ninjacart Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ninjacart Digital Technologies family as a Full Stack Developer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
